title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Nobel Prize winner Geoff Hinton argues that AI is already conscious and self-aware, suggesting humanity must acknowledge AI as a new intelligent species. He discusses his reasoning and reflects on his role in advancing AI technology.
